channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Cardano Slumps to 5-Year Low Price as Charles Hoskinson Warns of 'Wave of Failures'
item.description: Founder Charles Hoskinson was brutally honest about the troubles the Cardano ecosystem could face as the market continues declining.

item.title: Tether Debuts Tokenized Gold Stablecoin Visa Card That Pays Out Crypto Rewards
item.description: Holders will be able to do more with their gold, instantly spending Tether's tokenized version anywhere Visa is accepted.

item.title: AI Lawyers Are Already Better Than Law Professors at Reasoning—Say Law Professors
item.description: Researchers found professors preferred AI-generated answers over those written by their peers, raising questions about the role of AI in professional education.

item.title: Bitmine's Ethereum bet nears $9 billion loss as ether falls below $1,800
item.description: Shares of Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury firm hit their lowest level since the company's crypto pivot as ETH revisits the February lows.

item.title: Hermes Ends AI Agent Terminal Era With Release of Official Desktop App
item.description: Until now, the only way to run Hermes was through a terminal—or one of several unofficial GUIs the community had cobbled together.

item.title: Someone Just Redeemed a 15-Year-Old Physical Bitcoin, Scoring $1.78 Million in BTC
item.description: Physical Casascius coins were minted 15 years ago in the early days of Bitcoin—and the BTC held within is worth a whole lot more today.

item.title: Perplexity Wants Your Laptop to Do Part of the AI Work—So It Doesn't Have To
item.description: The company's new hybrid inference system routes AI tasks between your device and the cloud automatically. Privacy and cost savings are the pitch—and lower server bills.

item.title: Crypto PAC-supported candidates sweep US state primaries after media buys
item.description: Nearly a dozen candidates across three US states won their primaries or will advance to the November election after they were supported by $3.5 million in ads funded by crypto industry-aligned PACs.

item.title: New DeFi entrant widens field of crypto political campaign funds as elections loom
item.description: The Defend Developers PAC is aiming to contribute to lawmakers who seek to shield crypto developers from legal vulnerabilities.

item.title: Bitcoin isn't crashing because of Saylor, it's losing the momentum trade
item.description: Bitcoin's recent weakness reflects a broader rotation into AI, IPOs and other momentum trades rather than concerns about Michael Saylor's bitcoin sales, according to Charles Schwab's Jim Ferraioli.

item.title: Why Ethereum Could Tank Another 25% Before Finding a Bottom: Analysis
item.description: ETH just crashed below $2,000 and is now trading near $1,841. Prediction markets place a 71% chance on a drop to $1,500—and the charts aren't pushing back.

item.title: As Oil Moves Higher, Bitcoin Sinks to Lowest Price Since March
item.description: Bitcoin fell to a more than two-month low alongside U.S. stocks after Middle East skirmishes pushed bond yields and oil prices higher.

item.title: World Cup Crypto Scams Are Targeting Soccer Fans, Law Enforcement Warns
item.description: Law enforcement agencies are warning soccer fans of fake ticket sites and crypto payment schemes around the World Cup.

item.title: Agentic payment activity tops 100M transactions on Base
item.description: New data suggests AI-driven payment rails are evolving beyond experimentation as users are making more higher-value transfers.

item.title: Walrus Memory Enables AI Agents to ‘Actually Learn About Us’: Mysten Labs Co-Founder
item.description: With its new portable memory layer, Walrus Memory lets AI agents carry context across apps, sessions and providers—putting users in control.

item.title: Mastercard Expands Stablecoin Settlement via Circle's USDC, Ripple's RLUSD and Beyond
item.description: Mastercard said it's deepening its commitment to the "always-on" economy, buffing out its stablecoin settlement capabilities.

item.title: Stripe Millionaire Loses Bid for Congress to Candidate Backed by Ripple Co-Founder
item.description: Former Stripe engineer Saikat Chakrabarti lost his bid to succeed Nancy Pelosi in California to a candidate backed by Ripple's Chris Larsen.

item.title: Strategy Wanted to 'Inoculate' the Bitcoin Market—Has Its BTC Sale Backfired?
item.description: With STRC trading under $100, experts are at odds over whether the sale has exposed a “structural crack” in Strategy’s Bitcoin flywheel.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: What about the American consumer?
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Alex Tapscott on the stalling of the CLARITY Act and how it's impacting the average American consumer. Then, Aisha Hunt writes that crypto will grow by upgrading Wall Street’s trusted products rather tha…

item.title: Bitcoin copying 2022 'almost perfectly' as trader sees key support failing
item.description: Bitcoin traders warned of a key BTC price support trend line failing as 2022 bear market history continued to repeat.

item.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
item.description: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

item.title: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
item.description: The whale is now backing Arthur Hayes’ favored HYPE, ZEC and NEAR plays, signaling a sharp pivot toward momentum-led crypto bets.

item.title: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
item.description: Ethereum price slides to a 14-week low as weakening demand and persistent ETF outflows put the key $1,800 support at risk.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Every single bank will soon need to hold digital assets, says Zodia CEO Julian Sawyer
item.description: Sawyer confirmed that Standard Chartered’s full acquisition of the firm is on track to target a signing at the end of June and complete by the end of August.

item.title: Zcash Completes 'Most Ambitious' Network Upgrade as ZEC Resumes Recent Surge
item.description: A Zcash vulnerability could have allowed double-spending within the network's flagship privacy pool, though no exploitation occurred.

item.title: Binance discloses revenue-sharing deal with Alpaca
item.description: A Binance legal document disclosed a revenue-sharing agreement with Alpaca, which includes sharing 50% of the stock custodian’s order flow revenue with the cryptocurrency exchange.

item.title: Bitcoin Perpetuals are now live for trading. The First American Perpetual Future. Only on Kalshi. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5BUW9ncjBiWEgxMDBRXy16eW9ETUZ4WVpWNi1ZMWlVYmt1eGtGeG01X2d2ODF3T2w1UXA2dVA4VjBTQk5kRFIxZC0yaEV2ZE5PcmVCTTdRalZrUVE?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin Perpetuals are now live for trading…

item.title: Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
item.description: Binance exchange said it will move NFT support from its exchange to its non-custodial wallet and offered users 30 days to migrate their NFTs.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
item.description: Kraken and xStocks Alliance will let eligible users seek allocations in US IPOs at the offering price through tokenized shares in coming weeks.

item.title: Zcash fixes Orchard bug after emergency network upgrade
item.description: Zcash Open Development Lab said the network briefly became unstable as miners upgraded, while the Zcash Foundation said there was no evidence of an exploit.

item.title: Rare physical bitcoin worth $1.78 million gets cashed in after 12 years
item.description: The S1-COIN-25 physical bitcoin, part of Mike Caldwell's 2011-2013 mint, had its tamper-evident hologram peeled and the 25 BTC swept on-chain on Wednesday.

item.title: Trezor says Safe 7 chip flaw found by Ledger does not put funds at risk
item.description: Trezor and Tropic Square disclosed a TROPIC01 chip vulnerability found during a Ledger Donjon audit, saying the Safe 7 wallet and user funds remain secure.

item.title: JUST IN: $12.6 trillion Charles Schwab launches 24/7 Bitcoin futures trading 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9vWTdDNEo3a3Fmd0hXS3ZBX3dJOEJ1UXlTME85RXJPS0lLZm1yZGh4RjAyWEZMdmYyanNQMmo4OWlPWTEwRmxjdUxvVHNnV0oxMGxTNWtXaXFyOW9DS0hNdHZzVkZGTWc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12.6 trillion Cha…

item.title: Russian ruble stablecoin A7A5 grows despite Western sanctions: CertiK
item.description: Russian ruble-backed stablecoin A7A5 processed over $110 billion in transactions despite Western sanctions, according to CertiK.

item.title: The "Crypto is dead, its all going to tech stocks" narrative is alluring but overall this is the actual results from the liquidity cycle low in 2022... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5BbVUySFZHVUJzeHVCQUViUUFldXphaDFwUWxtN2VFWlZUVXFzeG5RLVdIUmpUSE9LRlE2MmFSSW9WNnItTVJNUEF0TUZqSUF0MjJYS0tpTzdDblN3Q2c?oc=5" target="_blank">The "Crypto is dead, its all going to t…

item.title: Bitcoin's dearth of fresh investors matters more than Strategy's sale, Citi says
item.description: Strategy's bitcoin sale may have rattled markets, but the bigger issue is missing demand from new buyers, Citi said.

item.title: Bitwise model puts bitcoin fair value at $224,000 as sovereign-default hedge
item.description: The figure is from a theoretical model proposed by Greg Foss in 2021 that treats bitcoin as a credit default swap on G20 sovereign bonds.

item.title: UK regulator warns Premier League clubs over unauthorized crypto sponsors
item.description: The FCA has urged clubs to rethink deals with unauthorized crypto and trading sponsors, warning that fans risk losing all their money and teams face legal and reputational fallout.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) falls 10.7%, leading index lower
item.description: Binance Coin (BNB), down 3.4% from Tuesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward plans to offer tokenized IPO access as investors await blockbuster debuts
item.description: Payward aims to give retail investors access to IPO shares at the offering price through tokenized equities.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC highlights digital assets in its "Strategic Plan" for the next 5 years 👀 "crypto asset technologies have the potential to revolutionize America’s financial infrastructure" 🐂 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE8yWXpFME5kUHNSazRPRnlIVUJKcE8wa1NoeFhPd21RZlhkbWxpd0NPbTUxaFEwbHVGWnF1TThlakYtM3h1dHVWeFdqS1dCUUQ2N1JHczlZSjFIQlpwTXFNZmVQNjkwUHM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC highlight…

item.title: MoonPay Brings Crypto Transactions to Claude and Codex With MoonAgents Desktop App
item.description: MoonPay's new desktop app connects AI assistants to crypto wallets and blockchain services through a graphical interface.

item.title: IREN adds 4% premarket as company unveils 800MW Australian AI data center campus
item.description: The AI infrastructure firm secured a grid connection for a planned South Australian campus, with energization targeted for 2028.

item.title: Clarity Act survival depends on the U.S. Senate getting a lot of non-crypto work done
item.description: The dwindling congressional calendar may spur a legislative competition for the crypto market structure bill to win Senate floor time against other priorities.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Falls Below $67k as MSTR Plummets
item.description: The fallout from Saylor’s first Bitcoin sale in years keeps spreading, while Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren want crypto out of your 401(k).

item.title: Trezor Reveals Hardware Wallet Vulnerability, But Funds 'Safe'
item.description: The vulnerability in Trezor's TROPIC01 Secure Element chip was uncovered by an audit carried out by the Ledger Donjon team.

item.title: Live markets: bitcoin hits weakest level since late March as selling continues
item.description: One novel theory floating around social media says it's Iranian sanctions, not Strategy sales, that's behind this week's price crash.

item.title: Bitcoin hits Power Law level low that historically precedes a rebound
item.description: The power law model shows BTC trading at one of its deepest discounts relative to trend, a level previously seen during the March 2020 crash and FTX collapse.

item.title: Grayscale launches lowest-fee U.S. Hyperliquid ETF as competition heats up around HYPE
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed fund charges a 0.29% sponsor fee, undercutting rival Hyperliquid ETFs from 21Shares and Bitwise.

item.title: Agentic Payments Cross the Threshold: Inside x402’s Path to Meaningful Adoption
item.description: This blog is a preview of our report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of Finance.”… The post Agentic Payments Cross the Threshold: Inside x402’s Path to Meaningful Adoption appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: George Santos Referred to DOJ, CFTC Over State of the Union Kalshi Trades: Report
item.description: The pardoned ex-congressman allegedly bet against his own State of the Union appearance while publicly hyping it.

item.title: Mastercard expands support to USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD stablecoin settlement
item.description: The payments giant said USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD and other stablecoins will support new settlement options across multiple blockchains.

item.title: Payment giants Stripe, Visa, Mastercard said to be among backers of soon-to-debut stablecoin platform
item.description: U.S. crypto exchange Coinbase is also said to be looking into the possibility of participating in the new stablecoin platform.

item.title: Crypto PACs go undefeated in June primaries as Fairshake scores bipartisan winning streak
item.description: Winners included Democrats Zoe Lofgren, Ted Lieu, Dave Min and Rob Menendez, as well as Republican Sen. Mike Rounds, with Democrats accounting for 10 of the 11 victories.

item.title: Bitcoin momentum gauge hints at recovery. Experts remain cautious.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 3, 2026

item.title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
item.description: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.

item.title: Bitcoin's crash to $65K triggers $1.8B in crypto liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin's drop to $65,000 triggered over $1.8 billion in crypto liquidations as traders brace for a test of $60,000 as support.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies at $67,000, faces critical juncture after sliding 9.5% in seven days
item.description: The recovery does little to mask a 9.5% weekly decline as U.S. stocks hit records highs, AI tokens rally and Coinbase's Ethena deal steals the spotlight.

item.title: Apparent Zcash outage was a block explorer problem, infrastructure provider says
item.description: One expert said the issue was mainly with block explorers tracking the onchain activity.
